events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the load-vs-radius check failed verification, so this is scored `fail` / `critical` risk — an unconfirmed or exceeded load chart capacity at the working radius is a tip-over/structural-failure hazard under OSHA 1926.1400/1926.1417, requiring the lift to stop until a qualified person re-verifies radius, rigging weight, and configuration against the correct load chart line.
